description: This pipeline processes biomedical microscopic images by first importing them and then extracting relevant metadata, which is subsequently annotated and formatted for further analysis. The images themselves are converted to a suitable format and their properties are added as annotations. Additionally, specific values are extracted from the metadata using XPath expressions and used to further annotate the data, ultimately resulting in a fully processed and annotated image with associated metadata.

0660eee7-ee6a-4e33-8768-3565de92ee6f.name: ij1-extract-ome-image-xml
0660eee7-ee6a-4e33-8768-3565de92ee6f.description: Extracts the OME metadata XML from an OME image

02b12d25-d1a4-418e-8b4c-0c8d6abe0ba6.name: xml-annotate-with-xml-data
02b12d25-d1a4-418e-8b4c-0c8d6abe0ba6.description: Extracts a value from the input text data (via XPath) and annotates the data with the result. Please visit https://www.w3schools.com/xml/xpath_intro.asp to learn about XPath.

43c29dff-b8ba-4ad9-bcaa-762cdcf661b5.name: image-properties-to-annotation
43c29dff-b8ba-4ad9-bcaa-762cdcf661b5.description: Adds data annotations that contain the image properties.

23c37ca3-351d-4e16-a5a0-44504a934281.name: import-imagej-bioformats
23c37ca3-351d-4e16-a5a0-44504a934281.description: Imports images via the Bio-Formats plugin

e49cfc5b-6a22-4a8a-9401-92983549b0ac.name: ome-annotate-with-metadata
e49cfc5b-6a22-4a8a-9401-92983549b0ac.description: Annotates an OME image with metadata extracted from the OME metadata
